mcqQuestions.question: What is the time complexity of accessing an element in a hash table (best case)?
Which of the following is NOT a principle of Object-Oriented Programming?
In React, what is the purpose of the useEffect hook?

codingQuestions.title: Two Sum
codingQuestions.description:
Given an array of integers `nums` and an integer `target`, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to `target`.

You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution, and you may not use the same element twice.

You can return the answer in any order.

hrQuestions.question: Tell me about yourself.
followUps: What interests you most about this role?
How do your experiences align with our company values?

hrQuestions.question: Why are you interested in this position?
followUps: What specific aspects of this role excite you?
How does this align with your career goals?

hrQuestions.question: Describe a challenging project you worked on. How did you handle it?
followUps: What would you do differently if you faced a similar situation?
How did you measure the success of your solution?
